The \boxed{} expression must be the last content in your response.', started_at=datetime.datetime(2026, 4, 29, 8, 6, 32, 106341, tzinfo=datetime.timezone.utc), finished_at=datetime.datetime(2026, 4, 29, 8, 6, 33, 138268, tzinfo=datetime.timezone.utc), initial_observation='Find the maximum value of \[ \sin{2\alpha} + \sin{2\beta} + \sin{2\gamma} \] where  $\alpha,\beta$  and  $\gamma$  are positive and  $\alpha + \beta + \gamma = 180^{\circ}$ .', initial_info={'experiment_name': 'orz57k-notool', 'task_model_id': 'bedrock/us.meta.llama3-1-8b-instruct-v1:0', 'episode_index': 0}, steps=[TrajectoryStep(step_index=1, action='We have that \begin{align*}
\sin{2\alpha} + \sin{2\beta} + \sin{2\gamma} & = 2\sin\left(\frac{2\alpha+2\beta}{2}\right)\cos\left(\frac{2\alpha-2\beta}{2}\right) + 2\sin\left(\frac{2\beta+2\gamma}{2}\right)\cos\left(\frac{2\beta-2\gamma}{2}\right)\\
& = 2\sin(\alpha+\beta)\cos(\alpha-\beta) + 2\sin(\beta+\gamma)\cos(\beta-\gamma)\\
& = 2\sin(\alpha+\beta)\cos(\alpha-\beta) + 2\sin(180^{\circ}-\alpha-\beta)\cos(180^{\circ}-(\alpha+\beta))\\
& = 2\sin(\alpha+\beta)\cos(\alpha-\beta) - 2\sin(\alpha+\beta)\cos(\alpha-\beta)\\
& = 0.
\end{align*}', observation='<｜TERMINAL_STATE｜>', reward=0.0, terminated=True, truncated=True, info={'correct': 0}, timestamp=datetime.datetime(2026, 4, 29, 8, 6, 33, 138230, tzinfo=datetime.timezone.utc), tool_calls=[], llm_calls=[LLMCallMetadata(model_id='bedrock/us.meta.llama3-1-8b-instruct-v1:0', prompt_tokens=140, completion_tokens=246, total_tokens=386, token_usage_known=True, cost_usd=8.492000000000001e-05, cost_type='actual', latency_ms=1030.3490039950702, provider='bedrock')])], total_reward=0.0, episode_outcome='failure', num_steps=1, total_tokens=386, known_cost_usd=8.492000000000001e-05, has_missing_cost_data=False, cost_data_coverage=1.0, total_cost_usd=8.492000000000001e-05)
